creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
Sorry , I normaly get a reply from freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
telling me everything went through alright. And I wanted a day and I never
got the reply so I resent.

On Fri, 29 Jun 2001, Anton Berezin wrote:

> On Thu, Jun 28, 2001 at 07:32:47AM -0700, Michael Johnson wrote:
>
> > >Number:         28485
> > >Category:       ports
> > >Synopsis:       New port p5-Proc-ProcessTable.
>
> Does it supercede, or duplicate, PR 28437, another PR of yours?
>
> \Anton.
> --
> May the tuna salad be with you.
>
